theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

verdicts.name: Hyperliquid

verdicts.label: HOLD

narrative.summary: Hyperliquid: 정량 종합 56점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 60 / 중기 68 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 극과열
overheat.guidance: 회피하거나 차익실현. 지금 진입은 단기 손실 위험 매우 큼.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 3개 시그널 합류 — Swing Low, Fib 0.5, 라운드 $40. 현재가 대비 +31.7% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $39.73 아래 손절가 $36.36 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

timeframes.note: 가격이 50/200MA 위 + 골든 크로스 · RSI 과매수

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Gold Steady as US-Iran Signals Keep Rate Hike Bets Simmering
top_news.summary: Gold moved in a narrow range as conflicting signals on the progress of US-Iran ceasefire talks continued to keep traders guessing over whether central banks may need to keep interest rates higher for longer to combat inflation.

top_news.title: IMF Approves About $1 Billion Disbursement for Argentina in Fresh Win for Milei
top_news.summary: The International Monetary Fund’s executive board approved Argentina’s latest program review to unlock about $1 billion, a vote of confidence in President Javier Milei despite missing a key program target.

top_news.title: What to Know About the SpaceX IPO
top_news.summary: Elon Musk gave the financial world a lot to ponder as SpaceX made public its plans for an initial public offering. The IPO is poised to be the largest stock-market debut in history, but as financial paperwork unveiled on May 20 confirmed, SpaceX’s success as a public enterprise will depend on its ability to meet lofty goals across space exploration, satellite communications and artificial intelligence.

top_news.title: Lone Star Weighs Sale of Lender IKB After Nearly 20 Years
top_news.summary: Buyout firm Lone Star Funds is in the early stages of exploring a sale of IKB Deutsche Industriebank AG nearly two decades after investing in the German lender, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

top_news.title: Workday Rallies After Results Quiet Fears of AI Disruption
top_news.summary: Workday Inc., a maker of workplace management software, posted better-than-expected results in the first quarter, helping quell concerns that the company will be disrupted by artificial intelligence.

top_news.title: US Races to Create Domestic Rare Earths Supply
top_news.summary: Tripp Hornick, principal at Quince Street Strategy, said that the US allowed the mining and manufacturing of rare earth elements to be pushed overseas because investors felt it was too expensive and 'dirty' to back. Now, the US is facing the consequences of moving that supply chain process overseas, as the US and other world powers race to build a system that is not reliant on China for minerals that are key to national security.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: New Grads Face the Tightest Labor Market in Years
top_news.summary: First jobs? In this economy? On today’s Big Take podcast: How 2026 college graduates are adapting to a low-hire, low-fire environment. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Dow Average Climbs to Record on US-Iran Deal Hopes: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Hopes for a diplomatic way out of the war in Iran lifted stocks as oil dropped on speculation that a deal would pave the way for a revival of energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Flight Firm CAE Says Defense Deals, Cost Cutting to Drive Profit Surge
top_news.summary: Flight simulator firm CAE Inc. unveiled a plan to increase operating income by 30% or more by 2030 as its new chief executive officer embarks on a strategy that includes a greater focus on defense clients.

top_news.title: Bitcoin Investors Sell Hardest Just When Prices Start to Recover
top_news.summary: Bitcoin’s bad stretch of ETF outflows has exposed an uncomfortable dynamic in the crypto market’s structure: the price level that should draw buyers back in is the one that also prompts some of the heaviest selling.
